title: Letter To Future Self
html: Stub. Recurring practice Yahir prescribes himself in 2024 05 13 things: "write yourself a letter 1 year from now, 3 years from now, 5 years from now, 10 years from now, 20 years from now." Sister-concept to note as letter to self but explicitly time-laddered. Re-asserted multiple times across the May 2024 entries — high recurrence weight.
